zh.lifeSummary: 當Wyllm Clyfford Clyfford於1536年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福時，他的父親Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter34歲，母親Mabel Welsche30歲。他於1563年與Joan Beard在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1608年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wyllm Clyfford Clyfford于1536年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福时，他的父亲Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter34岁，母亲Mabel Welsche30岁。他于1563年与Joan Beard在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1608年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clyfford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Wyllm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Northeastern English: habitational name from Wylam in Northumberland. The placename means ‘at the fish traps’ in Old English.

nameMeanings.name: Clyfford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, recorded as a given name from the 17th century. There are several places (e.g. in Glos., Herefords., and Yorks.) so named, from Old English clif ‘cliff, slope, riverbank’ + ford ‘ford’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Wyllm Clyfford Clyfford was born in 1536, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter, was 34 and his mother, Mabel Welsche, was 30. He married Joan Beard in 1563, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1608, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

ko.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Wyllm Clyfford Clyfford(이)가 1536년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Welsche(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1563년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 Joan Beard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1608년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wyllm Clyfford Clyfford родился в 1536 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel Welsche, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Beard в 1563 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1608 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wyllm Clyfford Clyfford nació en 1536, en Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mabel Welsche, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Joan Beard en 1563, en Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1608, en Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
